ranking.readme_summary: Agent Skills Agent Skills are folders of instructions, scripts, and resources that AI agents can discover and use to perform at specific tasks. Write once, use everywhere. Codex uses skills to help package capabilities that teams and individuals can use to complete specific tasks in a repeatable way

ranking.description: There can be more than Notion and Miro. AFFiNE(pronounced [ə‘fain]) is a next-gen knowledge base that brings planning, sorting and creating all together. Privacy first, open-source, customizable and ready to use.

ranking.readme_summary:
AFFiNE.Pro
Write, Draw and Plan All at Once


A privacy-focused, local-first, open-source, and ready-to-use alternative for Notion & Miro.
One hyper-fused platform for wildly creative minds.
